'''鈭歵h-z-sh''' ('''thazasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mock|mock]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mock|mock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-z-sh
|-
! Lemma
| thazasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thazashithi|thazashithi]] || [[word:thazashiji|thazashiji]] || [[word:thazashishi|thazashishi]] || [[word:thazashi|thazashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazashuthuth|thazashuthuth]] || [[word:thazashujuj|thazashujuj]] || [[word:thazashushush|thazashushush]] || [[word:thazash|thazash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazashuthu|thazashuthu]] || [[word:thazashuju|thazashuju]] || [[word:thazashushu|thazashushu]] || [[word:thazashu|thazashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazashufuth|thazashufuth]] || [[word:thazashufuj|thazashufuj]] || [[word:thazashufush|thazashufush]] || [[word:thazashuf|thazashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thazashethe|thazashethe]] || [[word:thazasheje|thazasheje]] || [[word:thazasheshe|thazasheshe]] || [[word:thazashe|thazashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazashothoth|thazashothoth]] || [[word:thazashojoj|thazashojoj]] || [[word:thazashoshosh|thazashoshosh]] || [[word:thazash|thazash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazashotho|thazashotho]] || [[word:thazashojo|thazashojo]] || [[word:thazashosho|thazashosho]] || [[word:thazasho|thazasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazashofoth|thazashofoth]] || [[word:thazashofoj|thazashofoj]] || [[word:thazashofosh|thazashofosh]] || [[word:thazashof|thazashof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thazash忙th忙|thazash忙th忙]] || [[word:thazash忙j忙|thazash忙j忙]] || [[word:thazash忙sh忙|thazash忙sh忙]] || [[word:thazash忙|thazash忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazashathath|thazashathath]] || [[word:thazashajaj|thazashajaj]] || [[word:thazashashash|thazashashash]] || [[word:thazash|thazash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazashatha|thazashatha]] || [[word:thazashaja|thazashaja]] || [[word:thazashasha|thazashasha]] || [[word:thazasha|thazasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazashafath|thazashafath]] || [[word:thazashafaj|thazashafaj]] || [[word:thazashafash|thazashafash]] || [[word:thazashaf|thazashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thazashasha|thazashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothazashasha|gothazashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithazashasha|gokithazashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thazashn眉sha|thazashn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothazashnkn眉sha|gothazashnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithazashn眉sha|gokithazashn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thazash毛sha|thazash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothazashnksh毛sha|gothazashnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithazash毛sha|gokithazash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thazashrosha|thazashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothazashnkrosha|gothazashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithazashrosha|gokithazashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thazashmusha|thazashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothazashnkmusha|gothazashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazashmusha|gokithazashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thazasherasha|thazasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothazashnksherasha|gothazashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithazasherasha|gokithazasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thazashngasha|thazashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothazashnkngasha|gothazashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithazashngasha|gokithazashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thazashyasha|thazashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothazashnkyasha|gothazashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithazashyasha|gokithazashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thazashyamasha|thazashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothazashnkyamasha|gothazashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithazashyamasha|gokithazashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thazashn眉sh毛sha|thazashn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothazashnkn眉sh毛sha|gothazashnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithazashn眉sh毛sha|gokithazashn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thazashn眉rosha|thazashn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothazashnkn眉rosha|gothazashnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithazashn眉rosha|gokithazashn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazashn眉musha|thazashn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothazashnkn眉musha|gothazashnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazashn眉musha|gokithazashn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thazash毛n眉sha|thazash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothazashnksh毛n眉sha|gothazashnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithazash毛n眉sha|gokithazash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thazash毛rosha|thazash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothazashnksh毛rosha|gothazashnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithazash毛rosha|gokithazash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazash毛musha|thazash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothazashnksh毛musha|gothazashnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazash毛musha|gokithazash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thazashron眉sha|thazashron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothazashnkron眉sha|gothazashnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithazashron眉sha|gokithazashron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thazashrosh毛sha|thazashrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothazashnkrosh毛sha|gothazashnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithazashrosh毛sha|gokithazashrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazashromusha|thazashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothazashnkromusha|gothazashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazashromusha|gokithazashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thazashmun眉sha|thazashmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothazashnkmun眉sha|gothazashnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithazashmun眉sha|gokithazashmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thazashmush毛sha|thazashmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothazashnkmush毛sha|gothazashnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithazashmush毛sha|gokithazashmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thazashmurosha|thazashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothazashnkmurosha|gothazashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithazashmurosha|gokithazashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thazash|thazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙z忙sh|th忙z忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothazash|hothazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙z忙sh|hoth忙z忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothazash|hohothazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙z忙sh|hohoth忙z忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thazash|n眉thazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙z忙sh|n眉th忙z忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thazash|n眉n眉thazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙z忙sh|n眉n眉th忙z忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thazash|n茂thazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙z忙sh|n茂th忙z忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thazash|n茂n茂thazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙z忙sh|n茂n茂th忙z忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthazash|luthazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙z忙sh|luth忙z忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthazash|luluthazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙z忙sh|luluth忙z忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithazash|lithazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙z忙sh|lith忙z忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithazash|lilithazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙z忙sh|lilith忙z忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothazash|kothazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙z忙sh|koth忙z忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothazash|kokothazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙z忙sh|kokoth忙z忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethazash|kethazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙z忙sh|keth忙z忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethazash|kekethazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙z忙sh|keketh忙z忙sh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
